---
title: "Processing"
---
::: {.callout-tip collapse=true}
# Learning Goals: Language Processing
(To be added)

:::


| Date | Topic | Slides | Due |
| - | --- | - | --- |
| Tues 11/10 |  Phonemes; categorical perception | | [SGN p. 39-40; p. 51-77]{.reading}
| Thurs 11/12 | TMS; motor and speech | | [Möttönen & Watkins (2009)]{.article}
| Friday 11/13 ||| [Researcher interview]{.due}
| Tues 11/17 | Constituency in psycholinguistics || [SGN p. 139-155]{.reading}
| Thurs 11/19 | Constituency in the brain || [Pallier et al. (2011)]{.article}
| Tues 11/24 | 

{{< include _includes/legend.qmd >}}


**Resources** 

* [Categorical Perception stimuli](https://splab.net/apd/u100/)
* [The McGurk effect](https://www.intro2psycholing.net/resources/McGurk/McGurk1.php)
* [The phoneme restoration effect](https://learninglink.oup.com/access/content/sedivy-2e-student-resources/sedivy2e-chapter-7-web-activity-4?previousFilter=tag_activities)
